sections.description: A production-ready static site boilerplate powered by webhouse.app CMS. Edit content in the admin, build with one command.

items.title: Zero JavaScript
items.description: Pure static HTML + CSS. No framework, no hydration, no bundle size.

items.title: CMS-Managed
items.description: Edit content in webhouse.app admin. Richtext, blocks, media, SEO — all built in.

items.title: Maps Included
items.description: OpenStreetMap integration with Leaflet. No API key required.

items.title: Deploy Anywhere
items.description: Static HTML deploys to GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel, Fly.io, or any web server.

_seo.metaTitle: My Site — Build Fast, Ship Today
_seo.metaDescription: A production-ready static site boilerplate powered by webhouse.app CMS.
